en: Mason., That's all we've ever wanted.
ko: 메이슨., 그게 우리가 원했던 전부야., 그는 그들의 지식이 필요했어.

en: He needed their knowledge., What they'd learned., Operation 40 had planted a
Double agent working with the Ascension Group.
ko: 어센션 그룹과 함께 일하는 이중 스파이를.

en: Growi Weaver., His mission was to sabotage the rocket.
ko: 위버., 그의 임무는 로켓을 파괴하는 거였어.

en: Something went wrong., Mason, I can't get these
Focus Mason., We're out of time.
ko: 집중해 메이슨., 시간이 없어., 세계가 전쟁 직전이야.

en: The world is on the brink of war., Who's war?, Who the are you
Anyway? Huh? Just keep hearing the numbers.
It's a broadcast mission. The numbers are a broadcast.
Keep hearing the numbers. It's a broadcast, Mason. The broadcast.
ko: 계속 숫자가 들려. 그건 방송이야, 메이슨. 그 방송.

en: Hudson learned about the numbers there.
ko: 허드슨은 거기서 그 숫자들에 대해 알게 됐어.
